content:
@sigil v0 hybrid

G: spoof(x-user-id) ∧ + ∧ authz_bypass

H: hdr_override ∧ sess_only ⇒ spoof_denied

P: req.headers['x-user-id'] → session.userId

V: !userId ∧ !401

R: !sess_only ∧ !spoof_
A: sess_only

[AUDIT]
Goal: spoof(x-user-id) and + and authorization bypass.
Hypothesis: header override and verified session auth only implies spoofed requests denied.
Plan: req.headers['x-user-id'] then session.userId.
Verify: high-risk userId and high-risk 401.
Risk: high-risk verified session auth only and high-risk spoof_.
Answer target: verified session auth only.
